title: salix × iserana
intro: Salix × iserana, also known as the Iseran willow or the hybrid willow, is a rare and little-known deciduous shrub that belongs to the family Salicaceae. The plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are similar to those found in aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × iserana include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a possible treatment for conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the bark of the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
